description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Crop Disease Forecast Alert No. 1 for 2026 (Reiwa 8): Wheat Scab has been issued.

【Situation】
From April 1 to 26, 2026, conditions favorable for the spread of wheat scab spores occurred on 11 days—the third-highest number in the past 10 years. Notably, three consecutive days of favorable spreading conditions appeared April 14–16 and April 23–25. Wheat sown in late November is at its most vulnerable flowering stage, which roughly coincides with these high-risk periods.

【Forecast】
Over the next month, temperatures are expected to be above normal and clear days fewer than typical. These conditions are favorable for wheat scab infection.

【Action】
If wheat scab appears in your wheat fields, apply additional fungicide treatment.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/nogyoshinkoka/9873.html
summary: ℹ️ Crop Disease Forecast Alert No. 1 for 2026 (Reiwa 8): Wheat Scab (April 27, 2026)
